title: Simplified protocol for Agrobacterium-mediated transformation of the liverwort Marchantia polymorpha, includes protocols for spore sterilisation
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"4dnu6","text":"Simplified protocol for Agrobacterium-mediated transformation of haploid liverwort Marchantia polymorpha spores. See the attached file for all steps, notes and information on reagents. Includes protocols for spore collection, storage and sterilisation.
